findings.detail: Map -> Measure -> Manage reads as a clear directed cycle; the bold thick Manage ==> Map return edge ('loop back as systems and risks change') makes the continuous-loop point unmistakable. Govern sits at top-center in the highlighted hitl-yellow tier with three dotted cross-cutting edges to all three loop functions, conveying 'holds the whole loop together'. No overlaps, truncation, or illegible crossings; all labels and subtitles legible at 1400px. Resolved the cycle-1 issue of three redundant 'holds the loop together' labels crowding the loop-back edge.
